v1.0.3.description:
Huge thank you to @Ladnok for joining as a contributor, and helping diagnose and fix several issues with the game interface.

Changes:
- Fixed shop desync caused by ivory bugs. (@Ladnok)
- Fixed several incorrect game pointers (@Ladnok)
- Banned the shop Pocket Incensory from runs.
- Added Spider Merchant softlock prevention. (@Ladnok found the correct pointer)
- Fixed incorrect mod version and archipelago generation issues.
- Fixed several archipelago generation rules which were being ignored.

To Update:
If you already have it installed, the livesplit component might update automatically. If it doesn't, or you don't have it installed yet, unzip the archive in your livesplit's components folder and add the randomizer to your layout. You can download and double click the .apworld to update or install it.
v1.0.3.title: Version 1.0.3
